strengths.title: Mentioned offer urgency
strengths.evidence: Actually, today is the last day of our offer. If you don't enroll today, the price will increase tomorrow.

improvements.title: Better needs discovery
improvements.suggestion: Ask more questions to understand customer's needs before pitching.

improvements.title: Explain product details before payment
improvements.suggestion: Provide clear information about the program before asking for payment.

improvements.title: Handle objections with empathy
improvements.suggestion: Address customer's price concerns more empathetically rather than pressuring.

red_flags.statement: Well, we'll explain everything after the payment.
red_flags.reason: Refusing to explain product details before payment can damage trust and compliance.

red_flags.statement: We have a great waste to wait for package for you. You will definitely lose 10 kg in just thirty days.
red_flags.reason: Unrealistic and potentially misleading claims about guaranteed weight loss.

summary: The advisor introduced herself clearly and created urgency around the offer, but failed to build rapport or properly discover customer needs. The advisor made unrealistic claims and refused to explain the program before payment, which likely caused the customer's hesitation. Objection handling was weak and came across as pressuring rather than empathetic. Overall, the call lacked professionalism and compliance, resulting in no sale.
